DataAnchor.description: Data integrity and batch hash storage contract
functions: storeBatchHash(uint hour, bytes32 hash, uint totalEnergy)

notes: 1. Run: cd blockchain && npx hardhat node
2. Run: npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
3. Copy CONTRACT_ADDRESS from deployment output to .env
4. Copy PRIVATE_KEY to .env (use first hardhat test account)
5. Dashboard will use these values for blockchain integration
